name: tu-dien-tieng-viet-data
description: Pipeline thu thap, chuan hoa va hop nhat du lieu tu dien tieng Viet mo.

scripts.pipeline: npm run sources && npm run website:gate && npm run test:academic-fixtures && npm run normalize && npm run test:normalized-checksums && npm run merge && npm run manifest && npm run validate && npm run provenance && npm run removal && npm run stability && npm run quality && npm run source:audit && npm run academic:audit && npm run academic:sense-draft && npm run academic:auto-cluster && npm run academic:near-duplicates && npm run academic:silver-benchmark && npm run academic:ai-proxy-gold && npm run academic:gold:accept-ai && npm run academic:gold:check && npm run academic:confidence && npm run academic:confidence-calibration && npm run academic:samples && npm run academic:phase6-facts && npm run academic:phase6-conflicts && npm run academic:phase6-ai-review && npm run academic:phase6-ai-proxy-review && npm run academic:phase6:accept-ai && npm run academic:phase6:projection-policy && npm run academic:ai-vs-reviewed && npm run academic:phase6-review-export && npm run academic:phase6-audit && npm run academic:validate && npm run academic:report && npm run academic:review-breakdown && npm run manifest && npm run audit:samples && npm run report
scripts.pipeline:refresh: npm run sources && npm run website:gate && npm run test:academic-fixtures && npm run fetch:refresh && npm run normalize && npm run merge && npm run manifest && npm run validate && npm run provenance && npm run removal && npm run stability && npm run quality && npm run source:audit && npm run academic:audit && npm run academic:sense-draft && npm run academic:auto-cluster && npm run academic:near-duplicates && npm run academic:silver-benchmark && npm run academic:ai-proxy-gold && npm run academic:gold:accept-ai && npm run academic:gold:check && npm run academic:confidence && npm run academic:confidence-calibration && npm run academic:samples && npm run academic:phase6-facts && npm run academic:phase6-conflicts && npm run academic:phase6-ai-review && npm run academic:phase6-ai-proxy-review && npm run academic:phase6:accept-ai && npm run academic:phase6:projection-policy && npm run academic:ai-vs-reviewed && npm run academic:phase6-review-export && npm run academic:phase6-audit && npm run academic:validate && npm run academic:report && npm run academic:review-breakdown && npm run manifest && npm run audit:samples && npm run report
